---
name: Feature
about: Request a new feature, product change, or focused improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Area

<!-- Example: web/routes, ui/field, server/auth, docs, deployments -->

## Problem Or Goal

<!-- What user need, workflow gap, or technical goal should this address? -->

## Proposed Outcome

<!-- What should exist or be true when this is done? -->

## Scope

<!-- Note what is included, excluded, or intentionally deferred. -->

## Context

<!-- Add links, screenshots, API notes, design notes, or related issues when relevant. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The changed behavior is clear.
- [ ] Validation steps are clear enough for a reviewer to repeat.
